overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned hospital or medical facility in a horror game setting. The player moves from a bathroom through dark corridors illuminated by flickering fluorescent and red emergency lights, navigating past scattered debris and waiting chairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned utility room with sinks and medical fixtures

events.description: begins moving forward toward the exit doorway

agents.ego_description: standing in a dilapidated bathroom, observing the surroundings, then walking toward the exit

entered.detail: row of metal sinks mounted on the left wall
white ceramic tiles covering the lower walls
small rectangular window showing dark exterior
white metal heating radiator against the back wall
medical supply cart with wheels in the center of the room
open doorway leading to dark corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a small abandoned utility room or bathroom with stainless steel sinks, tiled walls, and a medical cart. The player stands still initially, then begins moving toward the open doorway on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned hospital waiting area with scattered chairs

events.description: exits the bathroom through the doorway into a large open hallway
moves away from the bathroom light into darker corridor area

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into a large derelict hallway, looking around at the abandoned waiting area

entered.detail: row of empty waiting chairs along the right wall
dropped ceiling with fluorescent panels and exposed wiring
red illuminated exit sign hanging from ceiling
papers and rubble scattered across the floor

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bathroom into a vast abandoned hospital corridor with rows of waiting chairs and debris scattered across the tiled floor. The lighting dims as they move deeper into the hallway, with a red exit sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main corridor with medical equipment and emergency lighting

events.description: navigates around scattered debris and overturned chairs
approaching area with intense red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the debris-filled corridor, passing medical equipment and fire safety fixtures

entered.detail: plywood boards blocking a side corridor
red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the facility, the player navigates past a wooden barricade and fire extinguisher on the left, with scattered medical equipment visible. The corridor continues with rows of waiting chairs now on the left side, and the red emergency lighting becomes more prominent ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep corridor with intense red emergency lighting and reception desk

events.description: enters corridor section bathed in intense red emergency light
approaching reception desk area with glass partitions

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the red-lit corridor toward what appears to be a reception or administrative area

entered.detail: large reception counter with glass partition and office windows
wall covered in graffiti and markings

segments.scene_description: The corridor is now dominated by intense red emergency lighting casting long shadows. The player moves past overturned furniture toward a reception desk with glass partitions on the left, while graffiti-covered walls line the right side. The atmosphere is tense and ominous as the exploration continues deeper into the abandoned facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile utility room into a vast, ominous hospital corridor bathed in emergency lighting. It begins inside a small bathroom with stainless steel sinks and tiled walls, moving steadily toward an open doorway. As the camera exits the room, the space expands into a wide hallway filled with rows of waiting chairs and scattered debris, while the ambient light dims toward a distant red exit sign. The scene then shifts deeper into the facility, navigating past a wooden barricade and medical equipment as the red emergency glow becomes more prominent. Finally, the corridor is dominated by intense red light and long shadows, passing overturned furniture and graffiti-covered walls toward a glass-partitioned reception desk.
